summary: EPIC7-A AR / Piutang Aging module testing complete. All backend APIs (29/29 tests) and frontend features passed successfully. Module is fully functional with correct RBAC, calculations, and UI interactions.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ar/aging returns 200 with correct structure (totals, customers, config)
Backend: All bucket calculations correct (sum of buckets == total)
Backend: Customer outstanding sums match totals
Backend: Customers sorted by outstanding (descending)
Backend: All customers have valid credit_status (active/warning/blocked)
Backend: Denda rate configured (2.0%/month)
Backend: Denda calculations correct (customers with no overdue have denda=0)
Backend: Sum of customer denda equals total denda
Backend: GET /api/ar/aging/{customer_id} returns 200 with order details
Backend: Detail items have all required fields (order_number, due_date, days_late, bucket, outstanding, denda_estimate)
Backend: Sum of item outstanding matches customer outstanding
Backend: Unknown customer ID returns 404
Backend: Manager can access /api/ar/aging (200)
Backend: Sales gets 403 on /api/ar/aging (correct RBAC)
Backend: Entity filter works (filtered total <= global total)
Frontend: Login as admin successful
Frontend: Navigation to KEUANGAN > AR / Piutang & Aging successful
Frontend: AR Aging view loads with data-testid='ar-aging-view'
Frontend: All 4 KPI cards display correctly (Total Piutang, Jatuh Tempo, Lancar, Est. Denda)
Frontend: Aging bar displays with all bucket legends
Frontend: Customer table displays with 3 rows
Frontend: Money values use tabular-nums class
Frontend: Drill-down opens detail panel with order rows
Frontend: Detail panel closes correctly
Frontend: Overdue filter works (3 → 1 rows)
Frontend: Search filter works (3 → 1 rows with 'Butik' search)
Frontend: Refresh button works
Frontend: RBAC - Sales user cannot see KEUANGAN group
Frontend: RBAC - AR Aging menu not in sales user's navigation
